skill.name: medical-case-report-generator
skill.description: Generates a patient-friendly medical case report tweet from case images and disease name. Use when the user provides a medical case image and wants a structured report or tweet.
skill.summary: Automates structured medical case reports from patient images with disease education content.
skill.author: AIPOCH

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer flagged 34 potential issues across 3 files. After human evaluation, all 34 findings are false positives. The 21 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' flags match bash commands inside markdown fenced code blocks used for documentation. The 11 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' flags are pattern misidentifications on non-cryptographic text content such as skill descriptions and scope notes. The 2 'Hardcoded URL' flags reference a legitimate GitHub source attribution link. The 2 'System reconnaissance' flags match evaluation notes in an audit result JSON file. This skill is a prompt-based workflow for medical case report generation with no active network calls, data exfiltration mechanisms, or unauthorized code execution paths.

content.user_title: Generate Medical Case Reports from Patient Images
content.value_statement: Medical professionals spend significant time manually writing case reports from examination images. This skill automates report generation by extracting medical text from images, organizing patient data, and creating structured case reports with disease information and treatment guidance.
actual_capabilities: Extract printed and handwritten medical text from case images with high accuracy
Identify and anonymize patient information including age, diagnosis, and examination results
Generate disease-specific content including symptoms, treatment options, and health reminders
Create structured case report tweets with professional encouragement messages
Produce multiple title candidates following case report formatting conventions
Compile all sections into a single standardized Markdown report
limitations: Cannot diagnose medical conditions or provide clinical recommendations
Requires clear, legible case images for accurate text extraction
Does not support direct integration with electronic health record systems
Cannot verify the accuracy of information in the source images

use_cases.title: Clinical Research Documentation
use_cases.description: A medical researcher uses this skill to quickly create standardized case reports from examination images for research publication.

use_cases.title: Medical Education Content
use_cases.description: A medical educator generates anonymized case reports with disease explanations to train students on real clinical cases.

use_cases.title: Healthcare Social Media
use_cases.description: A hospital communications specialist creates patient-friendly case summaries and awareness content for public health education.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Case Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a medical case report from this patient image and diagnosis: [upload image]. The diagnosis is [disease name].
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick case documentation with minimal configuration

prompt_templates.title: Detailed Report with Disease Information
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a comprehensive case report from this medical case image. The confirmed diagnosis is [disease name]. Include full disease introduction, treatment options, and health reminders.

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Case Tweet
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a patient-friendly case report tweet from this image. The diagnosis is [disease name]. Keep the language accessible for a general audience and include an encouragement message.

prompt_templates.title: Anonymized Teaching Case
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a teaching case report from this medical image. The diagnosis is [disease name]. Ensure all patient identifiers are removed. Add detailed disease introduction suitable for medical students.

output_examples.input: Patient chest X-ray image with diagnosis of community-acquired pneumonia
output: Chief complaint: Fever and productive cough for 5 days
Pneumonia is a lung infection causing inflammation of air sacs. Common symptoms include fever, cough, and difficulty breathing.
1. Antibiotic Therapy: Macrolides or fluoroquinolones for 7-10 days
2. Supportive Care: Rest, hydration, and fever management
With appropriate antibiotic treatment, most patients recover fully within 1-2 weeks!

output_examples.input: Patient laboratory results with diagnosis of type 2 diabetes mellitus
output: Chief complaint: Polyuria and polydipsia for 3 months
Type 2 diabetes is a chronic condition affecting how the body processes blood sugar. Key symptoms include increased thirst and frequent urination.
Monitor blood glucose levels daily. Maintain a balanced diet low in refined sugars. Exercise for at least 30 minutes per day.
With consistent management and healthy lifestyle choices, many people with diabetes live full and active lives!

best_practices: Provide high-quality, well-lit images for optimal text extraction accuracy
Verify the extracted patient data for completeness before generating the final report
Review the generated report for any remaining personal identifiers before publication
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill to diagnose medical conditions or interpret test results
Do not upload low-resolution or blurry images as text extraction quality will be poor
Do not use this skill for emergency medical situations requiring immediate attention

faq.question: What types of medical images does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill accepts medical case images containing printed or handwritten text such as lab results, clinical notes, and examination reports.

faq.question: Does this skill provide medical diagnoses?
faq.answer: No. This skill generates reports based on provided images and confirmed diagnoses. It does not diagnose conditions.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for patient education?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill generates disease information and health reminders suitable for patient education materials.

faq.question: Does this skill protect patient privacy?
faq.answer: Yes. The workflow includes steps to anonymize patient information and remove personal identifiers.

faq.question: What output formats are available?
faq.answer: The skill generates structured Markdown reports with consistent sections including case summary, disease information, treatment options, and health reminders.

faq.question: Does this skill require an internet connection?
faq.answer: No. This is a prompt-based skill that processes information locally within the AI tool.
